items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of an individual cancellation within a group scenario. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the behavior of the system when an individual cancels their participation in a group event. The linked use case and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the expected behavior.
